name: Energy Cost Savings Calculation
short_description: Calculates the annual energy cost savings based on initial energy expenditure and a percentage reduction from sustainability initiatives.

name: Waste Management Cost Savings
short_description: Calculates the annual cost savings achieved through improved waste management, based on initial waste costs and a percentage reduction.

inputs.name: reduction_percent
inputs.description: Percentage reduction in waste management costs due to improved practices.

name: Dual Operational Savings from Energy and Waste Management
short_description: Calculates the total annual cost savings by combining reductions in energy and waste management expenses due to sustainability initiatives.

inputs.name: waste_cost
inputs.description: Annual waste management cost before reduction.

inputs.name: energy_reduction
inputs.description: Percentage reduction in energy cost (e.g., 10 for 10%).

inputs.name: waste_reduction
inputs.description: Percentage reduction in waste management cost (e.g., 15 for 15%).

name: Supply Chain Cost Savings from Sustainable Logistics
short_description: Calculates the total annual supply chain cost savings achieved through sustainable logistics, combining a fixed saving amount and a percentage saving on the remaining costs.

inputs.name: supply_chain_cost
inputs.description: The initial annual operational supply chain cost.

inputs.name: fixed_saving
inputs.description: The fixed cost saving amount achieved from process improvements.

inputs.name: extra_saving_percent
inputs.description: The additional percentage saving on the remaining costs, expressed as a whole number (e.g., 5 for 5%).

name: ROI Analysis for Sustainability Reporting
short_description: Calculates the Return on Investment (ROI) for a sustainability reporting initiative, considering initial investment, annual energy and waste savings, tax credits, and extra operational reductions over a specified period.

inputs.name: initial_investment
inputs.description: Initial cost of implementing the sustainability reporting system.

inputs.name: annual_energy_saving
inputs.description: Annual energy cost saving from the initiative.

inputs.name: annual_waste_saving
inputs.description: Annual waste management saving from the initiative.

inputs.name: tax_credit_percent
inputs.description: Tax credit percentage on combined annual savings.

inputs.name: extra_operational_reduction_percent
inputs.description: Extra operational cost reduction percentage on base savings.
